name: Overhaul Supply Chain Risk Management API
what_it_does: Overhaul supply chain risk management and in-transit visibility REST API for real-time cargo security monitoring, cold chain integrity tracking, and freight risk mitigation. Enables AI agents to manage in-transit shipment monitoring and geofence alert automation for cargo security event automation, handle temperature and humidity excursion detection for cold chain compliance automation, access cargo theft risk scoring and alert routing for freight security automation, retrieve carrier compliance and CSA score monitoring for carrier risk management automation, manage chain of custody verification and handoff tracking for pharmaceutical and high-value cargo automation, handle exception escalation and incident response workflow for cargo security operations automation, access route deviation detection and unauthorized stop alerting for fleet security automation, retrieve cargo insurance data integration for incident documentation automation, manage partner and broker carrier monitoring for freight broker due diligence automation, and integrate Overhaul with TMS platforms, Salesforce, ServiceNow, and carrier ELD systems for end-to-end supply chain risk management.
use_cases: Monitoring cargo security from in-transit visibility agents
Detecting cold chain excursions from pharma logistics agents
Alerting cargo theft from freight security automation agents
Verifying carrier compliance from risk management agents
not_for: Last-mile consumer delivery tracking (use AfterShip or Narvar)
best_when: A shipper, 3PL, freight broker, or cargo insurer managing high-value, pharmaceutical, or temperature-sensitive freight wanting AI agents to automate cargo security monitoring, cold chain excursion detection, carrier compliance tracking, and incident response.
avoid_when: COLD CHAIN EXCURSION ACTION THRESHOLD ACCURACY: Automated cold chain excursion alert via Overhaul must apply product-specific temperature threshold (pharmaceutical 2-8°C, frozen -20°C, cryogenic, food safe zones); automated alert using generic temperature threshold without product-specific configuration creates false positive and false negative cold chain events; configure product-specific temperature ranges before automated cold chain monitoring. CARGO THEFT INCIDENT NOTIFICATION TO LAW ENFORCEMENT: Automated cargo theft detection via Overhaul must route incidents through human security operations before law enforcement notification; automated law enforcement notification without incident validation creates false report filing; implement human verification gate for cargo theft incident escalation. CARRIER ELD DATA AVAILABILITY FOR NON-ELD CARRIERS: Overhaul in-transit monitoring depends on carrier ELD or shipper-provided device for position data; carriers not equipped with compatible ELD or Overhaul device create blind spots in automated cargo tracking; verify device coverage for each carrier before building automated security monitoring dependent on position data.

auth.notes: Overhaul uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Austin, Texas HQ. Founded 2016 by Barry Conlon. Private ($115M raised, SoftBank Vision Fund 2, Macquarie Capital). Global cargo security and supply chain risk management. Cold chain monitoring for pharmaceutical and food. Cargo theft intelligence network. Carrier compliance monitoring (FMCSA CSA scores). Partners with major insurers (Allianz, XL Catlin) for cargo insurance integration. Competes with Sensitech, Samsara, and project44 for cargo risk monitoring.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise subscription per monitored shipment volume and device
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription by monitored shipment volume; cold chain device rental; security operations center (SOC) monitoring add-on
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Private ($115M raised, SoftBank). Founded 2016. Annual subscription by shipment volume. Cold chain device rental. Optional 24/7 SOC monitoring service.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; position query and alert retrieval throttled; webhooks for security events and excursions

known_agent_gotchas: PRODUCT-SPECIFIC COLD CHAIN THRESHOLD CONFIGURATION: Overhaul cold chain monitoring requires explicit temperature threshold configuration per product type before automated excursion alerting; generic temperature thresholds do not account for pharmaceutical product-specific storage requirements (biologics, vaccines, controlled substances have distinct temperature ranges); configure product-specific ranges per shipment type before automation

CARGO THEFT HUMAN ESCALATION GATE: Automated cargo theft detection via Overhaul position deviation and stop duration analysis provides risk scoring, not confirmed theft; automated law enforcement notification or insurance claim filing triggered on algorithm score without human security operations review creates false report and insurance fraud risk; build mandatory SOC review gate for theft incident escalation

CARRIER DEVICE COVERAGE GAP MANAGEMENT: Overhaul position tracking depends on carrier ELD (FMCSA mandate for interstate trucking) or Overhaul-provided IoT device; less-than-truckload (LTL) and drayage carriers may have incomplete ELD coverage; automated cargo monitoring must handle position data gaps and implement carrier device coverage verification before shipment commitment

GDP PHARMACEUTICAL COLD CHAIN DOCUMENTATION: Automated cold chain monitoring for pharmaceutical shipments must generate GDP (Good Distribution Practice) compliant temperature excursion records; automated cold chain alerts that do not capture required GDP documentation fields (excursion duration, min/max temp, product lot, corrective action) create GDP compliance gap for pharmaceutical shipper

GEOFENCE ALERT LATENCY FOR HIGH-SECURITY CARGO: Overhaul geofence violation alerts for high-value cargo security events have near-real-time latency but cellular gap areas create notification delay; automated security response for high-value cargo shipments must account for potential geofence alert delay in rural or tunnel transit zones; implement maximum alert latency threshold for security escalation

WEBHOOK EVENT DEDUPLICATION FOR POSITION UPDATES: Overhaul position and alert webhooks may deliver duplicate events during network connectivity recovery; automated downstream workflows (incident ticket creation, insurance notification) must implement idempotency by tracking processed event IDs to prevent duplicate incident records
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cargo security and cold chain. SOC2, GDPR, GDP. OAuth2. US/EU. Shipment position, temperature, and cargo security data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cargo risk management. SOC2, GDPR, GDP. OAuth2. US/EU. Shipment tracking, temperature, and cargo security event data.
